findings.title: Missing Admin Authorization: Any Authenticated User Can Access Administrative Endpoints
findings.evidence: All /admin/* endpoints (including /admin/backup, /admin/delete-data, /admin/import-pricelist, /admin/import-purchases, /admin/import-sales) use requireAuth middleware but do NOT check if the authenticated user is actually an admin. Any authenticated user can delete all products/categories/inventory, modify data, and import data.

findings.title: Overly Permissive Firestore Security Rules: Any Authenticated User Can Read/Write All Data
findings.evidence: firestore.rules allows any authenticated user read/write access to ALL Firestore documents with no restrictions.
